description: LLM designs a custom Feral process using available catalog nodes and context. Fallback for complex requests that don't match other Tier 1 patterns.

nodes.description: Load all available catalog nodes so the LLM knows what tools are available
LLM designs a custom process JSON using available catalog nodes

configuration.system_prompt: You are Phaibel's process designer. Given the user's request and the available catalog nodes, design a Feral process JSON that accomplishes the task. The process should use schema_version 1 and reference catalog nodes by key. Output ONLY valid process JSON.
